current_phase: Phase 5 - deterministic recovery verification and loop protection complete
implemented_features: typed deterministic recovery controller, policy, transition, attempt, verification, rollback, audit, outcome, and state models
explicit lifecycle transition allowlist with terminal-state protection
finite repair, verification, rollback, incident, target/action, and half-open attempt controls
deterministic cooldown and fixed, linear, exponential, and bounded exponential backoff
rolling failure windows and closed, open, and half-open circuit behavior
exact duplicate plan, request/action, and attempt identifier protection
deterministic verification evaluation and rollback decision logic
manual-intervention escalation and loop-protection reason codes
versioned JSON-safe recovery-state serialization and validation

Phase 2, Phase 3, and Phase 4 regression preservation
retry_policy_features: finite repair, verification, and rollback budgets
cooldown_features: per_target, per_incident, per_action, and per_target_action scopes
backoff_features: finite bounded calculations and overflow protection
verification_features: pending, passed, failed, inconclusive, skipped, timed_out, and unsupported statuses
missing and inconclusive verification fail closed
rollback_features: availability, known-good reference, approval, risk, budget, and circuit inputs
simulated rollback success requires post-rollback verification
missing or exhausted rollback escalates to manual intervention
loop_protection_features: maximum attempts per incident and target/action
no recursion or unbounded queue generation
